_comment: Presence Engine room mapping. 'rooms' defines each room's sensor type + linger. 'devices' maps each Zigbee2MQTT friendly_name to a room — fill these in with the ACTUAL friendly names you give each sensor when pairing (see docs/presence-setup.md). Hot-reloaded on save. mmwave (FP300) is held occupied from the rising edge until the sensor's explicit falling edge, so its linger_s is a long DEAD-SENSOR FAILSAFE ONLY — it must exceed the sensor's longest silence while someone is present (a battery FP300 can go 15+ min without a report when people sit still; periodic reports are guaranteed ~hourly), NOT a short cutoff. Real departures send an explicit false (debounced by PRESENCE_FALLING_CONFIRM_S). pir (SNZB-03PR2) uses linger_s as the real timer that bridges motion re-triggers. Room names must match LIGHT_ROOM in scripts/lights_optimizer.py.
